atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 theme block. Used to define custom CSS variables for colors, fonts, and other design tokens.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 source directive. Used to explicitly specify glob patterns for content scanning.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 utility block. Used to define custom utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 config directive. Used to import an existing tailwind.config.js for compatibility.
